description_long: This is a rounded, deep blue cup with a smooth matte finish and a single, circular handle attached to one side. The exterior features prominent white text, including a website address and a handwritten-style name, giving it a personalized or branded appearance. The cup's body is slightly wider at the base and tapers gently toward the open rim, providing a stable foundation. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior is uniformly blue, matching the exterior, and appears to be hollow, suitable for holding liquids. There are no visible decorative patterns aside from the text, and the cup does not have a lid.
description: A deep blue, rounded cup with a single handle and white branding text on its exterior. The surface is matte and smooth, with no lid or decorative patterns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and prominent white text on the cup's body.
description_view_1: Side view focused on the handle, with only a partial glimpse of the text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain blue surface and the handle on the left, with no text visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the cup's open top and a partial view of the white text wrapping around the side.
